initiatives.name: Chattanooga Free Store
initiatives.description: A mutual aid organization providing free access to clothing, food, sexual health items, harm reduction supplies, and other essentials without requiring identification or documentation.

initiatives.name: Concerned Citizens for Justice
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization building Black power through mutual aid, political education, and community organizing in Chattanooga. Their work focuses on racial justice, police accountability, and building sustainable community support networks.

initiatives.name: Weelaunee Defense Chattanooga
initiatives.description: A solidarity organization supporting indigenous land defense and environmental justice through mutual aid and direct action. They work to build connections between communities while advocating for environmental and social justice.

initiatives.name: Help Right There Chattanooga
initiatives.description: Homeless Outreach, Advocacy and Post Housing Support

initiatives.name: Chattanooga DSA
initiatives.description: Working people should run the economy & society democratically to meet human needs.

initiatives.name: Chattanooga Harm Reduction
initiatives.description: SE Tennessee and NW Georgia's largest naloxone and test strip provider to people who use drugs and those who love them.

initiatives.name: Compassion Chattanooga
initiatives.description: Chattanooga is full of loving and creative individuals who fight for peace, equity and human rights for all!

initiatives.name: Chatt Moms for Social Justice
initiatives.description: A collective of mothers committed to the advancement of social justice issues through community activism

initiatives.name: Food Forest Chattanooga
initiatives.description: We are building community food forests, gardens, and other green & growing commons across urban Chattanooga, one neighborhood at a time- come join us!

initiatives.name: Chattanooga Queer Empowerment
initiatives.description: Through collaboration, skill-sharing, and mutual support, we work to strengthen connections across various community efforts, ensuring that every individual has access to the tools and support they need to thrive.
